Verified all 11 files retain exactly one <main>/</main> and one banner instance (python structural check). CSS added to site.css, no other selectors touched.

consent.js (custom banner, localStorage cf_consent, gtag consent mode: default all denied until accept, GA4 G-B7V6TVHWT2 loaded only after accept, GTM_ID placeholder empty=skipped) + head snippet (dataLayer/gtag default) injected into all 185 EN/IT/ES/FR static pages before existing language.js tag (bulk script, idempotent, verified 0/185 anomalies: consent.js count==1, language.js count==1, single <html>, ends </html>). catalogue_2026.py page has it inline natively. business_inquiry_submit event wired on all 4 locale contact forms (id=business-inquiry-form + submit listener). node --check passed on consent.js and both inline JS blocks. No tag fires before consent (verified: GA4/GTM script injection only inside grantConsent(), called only from accept-button handler or stored granted state).
